sign_in_subtitle: Welcome back! Please sign in to your account.
create_account_subtitle: Join UpSpeech to start improving your speech.
login_failed_message: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
register_success_message: Account created successfully! Welcome to UpSpeech.
forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
reset_instructions_sent: Password reset instructions have been sent to your email address.
password_reset_success: Your password has been reset successfully
invalid_reset_token: Invalid or missing reset password token. Please request a new password reset link.

validation.email_required: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

expired_invite.title: Invitation Expired
expired_invite.description: This invitation link has expired. Invitations are valid for 7 days.
expired_invite.contact_message: Please contact your therapist to request a new invitation.

signup_redirect_subtitle: Your account is created on the web. Open the link to continue, then return here to sign in.
signup_already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in.
signup_link_invalid: We couldn't read this invite link. Please open it from your email again, or sign in if you already have an account.
biometric_failed: Biometric authentication failed. Please try again.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
